title: Greece to protest Kyiv over sea drone as former PM blames Russia
summary_full: Athens is expected to lodge a formal démarche with Kyiv after a sea drone carrying explosives was found near a Greek island, diplomatic sources said
summary_public: Athens is expected to lodge a formal démarche with Kyiv after a sea drone carrying explosives was found near a Greek island, diplomatic sources said
